meaning: n.饥荒,<古>饥饿,严重的缺乏
examples: The famine threatened to depopulate the continent.
If the drought continues there's going to be a famine.
Many Irish people went over to America during the famine.
He received a national news Emmy Award for his coverage of the 1988 Sudan famine.
Michael cared deeply and used that talent to help bring attention to famine and poverty in Africa.
